description_long: This is a modern, rectangular ottoman-style chair upholstered in black leather with visible stitching along the seams. The seat cushion is thick and slightly overhangs the base, giving it a plush and comfortable appearance. The base is also padded and features a subtle, rounded contour, supported by four short, blocky legs that are barely visible. The leather surface has a glossy finish, reflecting light and emphasizing its smooth texture. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for both sitting and resting feet. Its sturdy construction and neutral color make it ideal for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or apartment lounges.
description: A modern black leather ottoman chair with a thick, cushioned seat and a glossy, smooth finish. It features a minimalistic, rectangular design with subtle stitching and short, blocky legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular seat cushion, visible stitching, and two short legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wide seat, overhanging cushion, and the full width of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same cushion and leg arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wide seat and the base's padded contour.
